company.name: Biogen Inc.
company.subtitle: Total Revenue $9.9B 2025 | MS heritage decline (Tysabri biosim, Tecfidera LOE) offset by Skyclarys + Leqembi + Zurzuvae rare disease pivot | Felzartamab IgAN Ph3 Q1 2026 | APELLIS ACQ May 2026: Syfovre GA $587M + Empaveli PNH $82M + Empaveli C3G $20M ramping + APL-3007 siRNA C3 Ph2 | Net cash post-APLS acq ~$-2800M (placeholder ~$7000M deal cost)
company.cashRunway: Self-funding ($2-3B op cash flow); post-Reata $7.3B Aug 2023 + HiBio $1.8B 2024 acquisitions

assets.name: Tysabri (natalizumab) — anti-α4 integrin mAb (MS) — biosim threat
assets.stage: Commercial (~$1.7B 2025; biosim Tyruko Sandoz US launch 2024)

market.notes: Anti-α4 integrin mAb (q4w IV; SC option 2023). PML risk requires JCV monitoring. Tyruko (Sandoz natalizumab biosim) US launch Aug 2024 driving decline. Class peers: Ocrevus (Roche CD20), Kesimpta (NVS CD20 SC).

assets.name: Tecfidera (DMF) + Vumerity (diroximel fumarate, DMF prodrug) — oral MS
assets.stage: Commercial (~$1.7B 2025; Tecfidera LOE 2020 declining; Vumerity successor +3%)

market.notes: Oral DMF franchise: Tecfidera ($1B post-LOE 2020) + Vumerity ($700M Tecfidera successor with better GI tolerability). Both activate Nrf2. Class peers: Aubagio (Sanofi teriflunomide), generics, Ocrevus + Kesimpta CD20 superior efficacy.

assets.name: Fampyra (dalfampridine, 4-aminopyridine ER) — MS walking impairment
assets.stage: Commercial (~$100M 2025); ROW only (US is Acorda Ampyra)

market.notes: Potassium channel blocker improves nerve conduction in demyelinated axons. Biogen books ROW; Acorda books US (Ampyra, post-LOE).

assets.name: Spinraza (nusinersen) — SMN2-targeting ASO (SMA; w/ Ionis 50/50)
assets.stage: Commercial (~$1.5B 2025, -2% FY); IT q4mo loading then q4mo maintenance

indications.name: Spinal muscular atrophy (all ages, all types)

market.notes: First SMA therapy (2016). Intrathecal q4mo. Class peers: Evrysdi (Roche oral SMN2), Zolgensma (NVS AAV9 GT pediatric one-shot). High-dose Spinraza (DEVOTE Ph3 positive 2024) refile pending.

assets.name: Skyclarys (omaveloxolone) — Nrf2 activator (Friedreich ataxia; ex-Reata $7.3B 2023)
assets.stage: Commercial (~$325M 2025, +30% growth); first & only FA drug

market.notes: Nrf2 activator (anti-oxidative stress). Approved Feb 2023 for FA (16+); peds expansion 2024. Reata $7.3B Aug 2023 acq. Class peers: gene therapy pipeline (Lexeo LX2006).

assets.name: Leqembi (lecanemab) — anti-amyloid mAb (early AD; w/ Eisai 50/50)
assets.stage: Commercial (~$400M Biogen-share 2025, +50% Q4 YoY); 53 countries; SC formulation pending

indications.name: Early Alzheimer's disease (MCI + mild dementia w/ amyloid+)

market.notes: Anti-amyloid mAb (protofibril-targeting). 50/50 Eisai partnership; Biogen books US share. Class peers: Kisunla (LLY donanemab), Aduhelm withdrawn. Trontinemab (Roche brain-shuttle Ph3) = transformational competitor.

assets.name: Zurzuvae (zuranolone) — GABA-A neurosteroid (postpartum depression; w/ Sage)

market.notes: Oral neurosteroid GABA-A modulator. Differentiated from Zulresso (brexanolone IV 60-hr infusion) = oral 14-day course. PPD only (MDD label rejected 2023). Class peers: Spravato (JNJ esketamine), Auvelity (Axsome).

assets.name: Heritage portfolio + Other Revenues (Aduhelm legacy + smaller MS + Other)

indications.name: Heritage tail (Aduhelm withdrawal + smaller MS + Hemophilia royalty + alliance)

market.notes: Heritage tail (~$1.4B): Aduhelm withdrawn 2024 (~$0M residual), Eloctate/Alprolix royalty post-Sobi divestment, Rituxan biosim royalty (ex-Idec), Hemophilia ex-Sobi alliance, Tysabri SC formulation alliance, contract manufacturing, Other Revenue (~$500M) + non-MS specialty. Mature/declining.

assets.name: Litifilimab (BIIB059) — anti-BDCA2 mAb (SLE + cutaneous lupus)
assets.stage: Phase 3 TOPAZ-1/2 SLE + LILAC CLE; readouts 2026-27

market.notes: Anti-BDCA2 (CLEC4C) on plasmacytoid dendritic cells; depletes Type I IFN production. Class peers: Saphnelo (AZN anti-IFNAR1), Benlysta (GSK BAFF), nipocalimab (JNJ FcRn Ph3), ianalumab (NVS BAFF-R Ph3).

assets.name: Felzartamab — anti-CD38 mAb (IgAN + AMR transplant; ex-HiBio acq 2024)
assets.stage: Phase 3 IgAN + AMR (antibody-mediated rejection); IgAN BLA 2026

market.notes: Anti-CD38 mAb depletes plasma cells producing pathogenic Gd-IgA1. Ph3 IgAN positive Q1 2026; BLA target H2 2026. Class peers: Tarpeyo (Calliditas), atrasentan (NVS), Fabhalta (NVS), povetacicept (VRTX).

assets.name: Syfovre (pegcetacoplan intravitreal) - PEGylated cyclic peptide C3 inhibitor (ex-Apellis acq May 2026)
assets.stage: Commercial (FDA Feb 2023; FY25 sales $587M; ~60% GA share vs Astellas Izervay)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Syfovre ~60% US GA share post Astellas Izervay Feb 2025 label expansion

assets.name: Empaveli (pegcetacoplan SC) - PNH (ex-Apellis acq May 2026; Sobi sold ex-US Jul 2025)
assets.stage: Commercial (FDA May 2021; FY25 US PNH ~$82M; PEGASUS Ph3 superior over eculizumab)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Empaveli ~10-15% PNH share vs AZ Soliris/Ultomiris C5

assets.name: Empaveli (pegcetacoplan SC) - C3G + IC-MPGN (ex-Apellis acq May 2026)
assets.stage: Commercial (FDA Jul 2025 sBLA; first SC complement therapy in nephrology; vs NVS Fabhalta)

indications.name: C3 glomerulopathy + primary IC-MPGN (rare progressive complement-driven glomerular disease)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Empaveli SC vs NVS Fabhalta iptacopan oral; proximal C3 differentiated

assets.name: APL-3007 - siRNA targeting complement C3 (ex-Apellis acq May 2026; q-quarterly/biannual)
assets.stage: Phase 2 combo with Syfovre in GA (topline 2027)

indications.name: Complement-driven diseases (GA + PNH + C3G; SC q3-6mo dosing)

mega_bear.narrative: MS franchise cliff accelerates (Tysabri biosim + Tecfidera generic erosion); Spinraza vs Evrysdi declines; Leqembi caps at $1B Biogen-share

bear.narrative: Steady managed MS decline; Skyclarys + Leqembi + Zurzuvae growth offset

base.narrative: Skyclarys $1B + Leqembi $2B Biogen-share + Felzartamab IgAN/AMR + pipeline 3/4
events: V Leqembi $2B Biogen-share with SC + biomarker
V Felzartamab IgAN approved 2026 + AMR transplant 2027

bull.narrative: Leqembi $4B+ blockbuster; Felzartamab CD38 multi-indication franchise; pipeline 4/4
events: V Leqembi $4B Biogen-share with pre-symptomatic + SC convenience
V Felzartamab IgAN + AMR + transplant rejection $3B+ peak
V BIIB080 anti-tau Ph3 positive (combo with anti-amyloid)

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Leqembi pre-symptomatic prevention + multi-pipeline; rare disease franchise dominant
events: V Multi-asset franchise approved + premium expansion

lastData.title: FY2025 Total Revenue $9.9B; MS heritage -7% offset by rare disease +8% + new launches (Leqembi+Skyclarys+Zurzuvae+Qalsody combined ~$1B). Felzartamab IgAN Ph3 readout Q1 2026.
points: FY2025 Total Revenue $9.9B; MS -7%; rare disease +8%
Tysabri (anti-α4 MS) ~$1.7B (-8%); biosim Tyruko (Sandoz) US launch Aug 2024
Tecfidera + Vumerity (oral DMF) ~$1.7B; Tecfidera LOE 2020 declining; Vumerity successor +3%
Avonex + Plegridy (IFN-β1a MS) ~$1.0B; declining vs orals + CD20
Spinraza (SMN2 ASO SMA, w/ Ionis 50/50) ~$1.5B (-2%); high-dose DEVOTE Ph3 positive 2024
Leqembi (anti-amyloid AD, w/ Eisai 50/50) ~$400M Biogen-share (+50% Q4 YoY)
Felzartamab (anti-CD38; ex-HiBio $1.8B Aug 2024) IgAN Ph3 readout Q1 2026 + AMR transplant Ph3
Litifilimab (anti-BDCA2 SLE/CLE) Ph3 TOPAZ + LILAC readouts 2026-27
BIIB080 (anti-tau ASO AD) Ph2; complementary to anti-amyloid

nextCatalyst.title: Felzartamab IgAN Ph3 + Litifilimab TOPAZ SLE H2 + Salanersen SOD1-ALS 2027
thresholds: Q1 2026: Felzartamab IgAN Ph3 readout (HiBio acquisition thesis)
H2 2026: Litifilimab TOPAZ-1/2 SLE Ph3 readouts

risks: Tysabri biosim Tyruko (Sandoz) US launch Aug 2024: ~$1.7B 2025 -> $1B 2027
Tecfidera LOE 2020 ongoing decline; Vumerity successor not fully replacing
Spinraza vs Evrysdi (Roche oral) + Zolgensma (NVS GT) competition
Leqembi vs Kisunla (Lilly) + Trontinemab (Roche brain-shuttle Ph3 transformational)
Litifilimab SLE class crowded (Saphnelo, Benlysta, nipocalimab, ianalumab)
Felzartamab IgAN class crowded (Tarpeyo, atrasentan, Fabhalta, povetacicept Vertex first-in-class)
Reata $7.3B + HiBio $1.8B + Sage zuranolone licensing -- M&A integration + goodwill

catalysts.title: Felzartamab IgAN Ph3 readout (anti-CD38 plasma cell depletion)
catalysts._rationale: HiBio Ph2 strong UPCR reduction; class peers (Tarpeyo, Fabhalta, povetacicept) all positive.

catalysts.title: Litifilimab TOPAZ-1/2 SLE Ph3 readouts
catalysts._rationale: Anti-BDCA2 first-in-class for pDC depletion in lupus.

catalysts.title: Tysabri biosim Tyruko (Sandoz) US launch -- accelerating decline
catalysts._rationale: Sandoz natalizumab biosim launched US Aug 2024; -8% 2025, accelerating 2026.
